title: Lakshmikanta Temple, Kalale
tagline: Lakshmikanta Temple, Kalale — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Lakshmikanta Temple is a Hindu (Vaishnava) temple in Kalale, a village in the Nanjangud taluk of the Mysore district, Karnataka state, India.
overview.description: The Lakshmikanta Temple is a Hindu (Vaishnava) temple in Kalale, a village in the Nanjangud taluk of the Mysore district, Karnataka state, India. The temple dates back at least to the early 18th century and is built in typical dravidian style. The temple is a protected monument under the Karnataka state division of the Archaeological Survey of India.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Nanjangud
topPlaces.description: Nanjangud, officially known as Nanjanagudu, is a town in Mysuru (city in the Indian state of Karnataka. It lies on the banks of the river Kapila (also called Kabini), 23 km from the city of Mysore.

topPlaces.name: Srikanteshwara Temple, Nanjangud
topPlaces.description: The Nanjundeshwara Temple (also called Srikanteshwara Temple) is an ancient temple dedicated to Shiva in the Hindu pilgrimage town of Nanjanagudu in Karnataka, India. It is located on the right bank of the Kapila River (also known as the Kabini River), a tributary of the Kaveri River, a tributary of the Kaveri River.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Lakshmikanta Temple, Kalale?
faq.a: The best time to visit Lakshmikanta Temple, Kalale is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Lakshmikanta Temple, Kalale?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (16 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (25 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Lakshmikanta Temple, Kalale?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Lakshmikanta Temple, Kalale at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Lakshmikanta Temple, Kalale?
faq.a: Stays in Lakshmikanta Temple, Kalale start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Lakshmikanta Temple, Kalale?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kalale, Nanjangud, Konanur, Mysore, Saragooru Nanjangud, Srikanteshwara Temple, Nanjangud.
